note-scope.label: Project is the umbrella, not one enormous aggregate.

messaging-scope.label: Agent Messaging
messaging-scope.description: DMs + team channel between live agents

msg-store.label: Message store
msg-store.description: Append-only log: audit record of every envelope

msg-injector.label: PTY delivery
msg-injector.description: normal: queue-typed; interrupt: Esc then type

msg-channel.label: #team channel
msg-channel.description: Fan-out recipient every agent can read

msg-briefing.label: Spawn briefing
msg-briefing.description: Standing instructions: your name + how to message

msg-ui.label: Messages view
msg-ui.description: UI feed of DMs + channel over ws

note-messaging.label: Sender decides delivery: normal queues into the turn; interrupt breaks it.

browser-scope.label: Agent Browser Sessions
browser-scope.description: Isolated per-agent browser + live off-screen mirror

bs-mirror.label: Mirror viewer
bs-mirror.description: Off-screen screencast grid + copyable page URL

bs-broker.label: Session broker
bs-broker.description: acquire / release / lookup; owns pool state

bs-policy.label: Allocation policy
bs-policy.description: Pure: choose free instance, grow or evict

bs-lease.label: Lease
bs-lease.description: TTL claim; reclaims a dead agent's instance

bs-pool.label: Chrome pool
bs-pool.description: Adapter: launches headless Chrome, own user-data-dir + port

bs-control.label: CDP control
bs-control.description: Adapter: Playwright over CDP, target-scoped, never bringToFront

note-browser.label: One session ⇢ one instance. No shared tab, so nothing to fight over — and it renders off-screen, so your foreground never moves.

webhook-relay--note-2-ack-is-not-a-recei.label: Ack is not a receipt: Ack answers the webhook sender instantly (got it, queued). A DeliveryReceipt records one delivery attempt to one subscriber. relay-log append returns void because logging is fire-and-forget.

mission-room-human-view.label: Mission Room — Human View
mission-room-human-view.description: The simple picture: one Mission, made visible to Chris

mission-room-system-wiring.label: Mission Room — System Wiring
mission-room-system-wiring.description: How existing Novakai parts become one trustworthy read-only view

mission-room-human-view--note-1-assign-a.label: Assign a Person to a Mission role. One Person may have zero or many live Presences; a disposable session is never the team member.

mission-room-human-view--note-2-the-miss.label: The Mission is the durable work. The Mission Room is a trustworthy read-only page, never another source of truth.

mission-room-human-view--mission-room.label: Mission Room
mission-room-human-view--mission-room.description: A read-only page for one mission

mission-room-human-view--mission.label: Mission
mission-room-human-view--mission.description: The durable job and intended outcome; ownership comes from its team assignment

mission-room-human-view--chief-pulse.label: Chief Pulse
mission-room-human-view--chief-pulse.description: The six-second answer: Are we okay, what changed, and do you need me?

mission-room-human-view--mission-team.label: Mission Team
mission-room-human-view--mission-team.description: People assigned to this mission with explicit roles and authority; role Owner is the ownership truth

mission-room-human-view--live-presence.label: Live Presence
mission-room-human-view--live-presence.description: The currently running processes for a team member; they may come, go, or overlap

mission-room-human-view--mission-thread.label: Mission Thread
mission-room-human-view--mission-thread.description: The meaningful causal history—not an unfiltered wall of tool calls

mission-room-human-view--evidence.label: Evidence
mission-room-human-view--evidence.description: Briefs, plans, audits, results, commits and pull requests with preserved provenance

mission-room-human-view--trust-signals.label: Trust Signals
mission-room-human-view--trust-signals.description: Snapshot freshness and recoverable read issues; the page never hides uncertainty

mission-room-system-wiring--mission-room.label: Mission Room UI
mission-room-system-wiring--mission-room.description: EXISTS: the current Mission Control shell; rewire it instead of rebuilding it

mission-room-system-wiring--note-1-exist.label: EXISTS means reusable today; PARTIAL means incomplete; CREATE means missing. Most infrastructure already exists—the real build remains Mission Linkage plus Mission View.

mission-room-system-wiring--note-2-write.label: WRITE RULE: mission commissioning records canonical linkage explicitly. Reads never infer it from titles, agent names or the active session.

mission-room-system-wiring--note-3-ident.label: IDENTITY RULE: Mission Thread, provider execution Thread and zero-or-many Rooms stay explicitly named until their underlying models are unified.

mission-room-system-wiring--mission-view.label: Mission View
mission-room-system-wiring--mission-view.description: CREATE: one deep read module that joins existing facts, preserves uncertainty and exposes one small interface

mission-room-system-wiring--mission-link.label: Mission Linkage
mission-room-system-wiring--mission-link.description: CREATE: owns canonical links; record at mission commissioning, resolve for reads, and never infer

mission-room-system-wiring--existing-rea.label: Existing Read Sources
mission-room-system-wiring--existing-rea.description: EXISTS: reuse current systems rather than creating parallel stores

mission-room-system-wiring--transcript-p.label: Transcript Projection
mission-room-system-wiring--transcript-p.description: PARTIAL: Claude and Codex are connected; add the Kimi session adapter and preserve recoverable issues

mission-room-system-wiring--chief-pulse-.label: Chief Pulse Projection
mission-room-system-wiring--chief-pulse-.description: CREATE: derived from collected facts and transcript history; it is not another stored record

mission-room-information-architecture.label: Mission Room — Information Architecture
mission-room-information-architecture.description: A read-only briefing for one mission: decide whether to relax, inspect, or intervene

mission-room-information-architecture--n.label: READ IN ORDER: six-second glance → one-minute understanding → proof only when needed.
OUT OF SCOPE: portfolio overview, raw transcript forensics, process review, and write controls.

mission-room-information-architecture--m.label: Mission Snapshot
mission-room-information-architecture--m.description: The single joined, read-only truth presented by every layer

mission-room-information-architecture--m.label: Mission Header
mission-room-information-architecture--m.description: Six-second answer: what is the outcome, are we okay, and do you need me?

mission-room-information-architecture--s.label: Situation Brief
mission-room-information-architecture--s.description: Plain-English orientation: why this matters, what changed, and what happens next

mission-room-information-architecture--t.label: Team & Current Work
mission-room-information-architecture--t.description: Accountable people, explicit roles, live presences, and the work each person owns now

mission-room-information-architecture--a.label: Attention Queue
mission-room-information-architecture--a.description: Only intervention-worthy blockers, risks, questions, and honesty gaps

mission-room-information-architecture--m.label: Mission Timeline
mission-room-information-architecture--m.description: Meaningful causal events, decisions, handoffs, and completed checkpoints—not tool-call exhaust

mission-room-information-architecture--e.label: Evidence Shelf
mission-room-information-architecture--e.description: Briefs, plans, reports, commits, pull requests, and results supporting the visible claims

mission-room-information-architecture--t.label: Trust Drawer
mission-room-information-architecture--t.description: Freshness, data-quality warnings, exact sources, and recoverable uncertainty

mission-control-ux-22-jul.label: Mission Control UX 22-Jul
mission-control-ux-22-jul.description: Overview of the V4 data domains; use the three adjacent detail maps for field-level lineage

mission-control-ux-22-jul--note-1-read-t.label: READ TOP TO BOTTOM: atomic truth and demo-only copy flow into the visible Mission Room sections.

mission-control-ux-22-jul--note-2-live-a.label: LIVE = available from MissionSnapshot now. PARTIAL = atomic facts exist but need a projection or safer link. MISSING = V4 currently uses fixture copy.

mission-control-ux-22-jul--linked-work-r.label: Linked Work Records
mission-control-ux-22-jul--linked-work-r.description: LIVE · tasks.jsonl, captains-log.jsonl, issues.jsonl, okrs.jsonl and requests.jsonl

mission-control-ux-22-jul--mission-packe.label: Mission Packet
mission-control-ux-22-jul--mission-packe.description: PARTIAL · .novakai/work/<missionId>/ files become evidence only when explicitly referenced

mission-control-ux-22-jul--operational-r.label: Operational Runtime
mission-control-ux-22-jul--operational-r.description: PARTIAL · agents.json, rooms.jsonl and messages.jsonl exist but need explicit mission binding

mission-control-ux-22-jul--v4-prototype-.label: V4 Prototype Copy
mission-control-ux-22-jul--v4-prototype-.description: MISSING SOURCE · friendly copy, promises, workflow, team and activity are currently JavaScript fixtures

mission-control-ux-22-jul--identity-and-.label: Identity and Outcomes
mission-control-ux-22-jul--identity-and-.description: Mission title, friendly headline, outcome, three promises, health and needs-you

mission-control-ux-22-jul--work-and-prog.label: Work and Progress
mission-control-ux-22-jul--work-and-prog.description: Six stages, tasks, workflow columns and meaningful activity

mission-control-ux-22-jul--people-and-pr.label: People and Proof
mission-control-ux-22-jul--people-and-pr.description: Team, current work, artifacts and the selection-driven right inspector

mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.label: Mission Control UX 22-Jul — Identity & Outcomes
mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.description: Exact lineage for the Mission Room header, outcome, promises and decision state

mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.label: All LIVE values travel through MissionViewHub -> MissionSnapshot. The wires name their atomic origin.
okrs.jsonl
mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.description: ATOMIC · objective title resolves only through mission.refs[kind=objective]

mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.label: requests.jsonl
mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.description: ATOMIC · a pending request needs an explicit mission ref to set needsChris

mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.label: V4 Static Copy
mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.description: DEMO ONLY · friendly headline, short summary and three promises live in mission-room-v4.html

mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.label: Mission Title
mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.description: LIVE / PARTIAL · official title is live; V4's friendly headline and kicker are fixture-authored

mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.label: Mission Outcome
mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.description: PARTIAL · pulse.outcome is live, but the stored outcome is currently a long completion report rather than concise intent

mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.label: Three Promises
mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.description: MISSING · no structured successCriteria[] or promises[] field exists; V4 hardcodes Protect, Preserve and Reveal

mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.label: Health and Needs You
mission-control-ux-22-jul-identity-outco.description: LIVE / DERIVED · health = attention or read issues; needsYou = pending request explicitly linked to mission

mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress.label: Mission Control UX 22-Jul — Work & Progress
mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress.description: Exact lineage for stages, tasks, workflow columns and meaningful activity

mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.label: Current V1 can show honest chronology. V4's richer causal story needs a presentation projection and explicit current-work facts.
missions.jsonl
mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.description: ATOMIC · current stage, status, mission timestamp and mission refs

mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.label: Task and History Stores
mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.description: ATOMIC · tasks.jsonl, captains-log.jsonl and issues.jsonl linked through typed refs

mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.label: Rooms and Messages
mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.description: ATOMIC · rooms.jsonl and messages.jsonl; only explicitly mission-linked rooms join the timeline today

mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.label: V4 Static Copy
mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.description: DEMO ONLY · STEP_COPY, demo step number, workflow cards and human activity sentences

mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.label: Stages
mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.description: PARTIAL · stage and status are LIVE; the six labels and state-to-step mapping are static V4 code

mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.label: Tasks and Workflow
mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.description: PARTIAL · linked tasks and their statuses are LIVE; Working now and Next require explicit current-work ownership

mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.label: Activity
mission-control-ux-22-jul-work-progress-.description: PARTIAL · chronological mission, task, log, issue and linked-room entries are LIVE; V4 narrative wording is fixture copy

mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof.label: Mission Control UX 22-Jul — People & Proof
mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof.description: Exact lineage for team, artifacts and the selection-driven right inspector

mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.label: The inspector owns no new truth: it formats the selected section's value, status, provenance and next action.
agents.json
mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.description: ATOMIC RUNTIME · agent, provider, session and availability exist; mission binding does not

mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.label: Mission Packet
mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.description: ATOMIC FILES · .novakai/work/<missionId>/ names, paths and observation mtimes

mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.label: V4 Static Copy
mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.description: DEMO ONLY · Kimi, Fable, Builder, Codex roles/current work and the independent-review evidence row

mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.label: Team
mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.description: MISSING / PARTIAL · owner is live; assignments are absent for this mission; presence and current work lack mission binding

mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.label: Artifacts
mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.description: PARTIAL / LIVE · explicit doc refs plus matching packet metadata are live; unlinked packet neighbours remain Attention

mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.label: Right Inspector
mission-control-ux-22-jul-people-proof--.description: CREATE PRESENTATION · selected center item -> human summary, status, facts, significance, next step and provenance trail
